zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey d'Aumarle於1268年之前出生在英國戴文時，他的父親William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone23歲，母親Margery de Fylegh15歲。他於大約1300年與Joan de la Pomerai在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1321年2月21日之前在英國戴文林普斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey d'Aumarle于1268年之前出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone23岁，母亲Margery de Fylegh15岁。他于大约1300年与Joan de la Pomerai在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1321年2月21日之前在英国戴文林普斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey d'Aumarle was born before 1268, in Devon, England, his father, William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone, was 23 and his mother, Margery de Fylegh, was 15. He married Joan de la Pomerai about 1300, in England, United Kingdom. He died before 21 February 1321, in Lympstone, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey d'Aumarle est né avant 1268, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margery de Fylegh, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Joan de la Pomerai environ 1300, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 21 février 1321, à Lympstone, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey d'Aumarle vor 1268 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone 23 und seine Mutter Margery de Fylegh 15. Er hat um 1300 in England, United Kingdom Joan de la Pomerai geheiratet. Er starb vor 21. Februar 1321 in Lympstone, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey d'Aumarle è nato il prima del 1268 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Fylegh, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Joan de la Pomerai circa 1300, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 21 febbraio 1321, nel Lympstone, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey d'Aumarleが1268年以前にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstoneは23歳，母Margery de Fyleghは15歳であった。約1300年にイギリスイギリスでJoan de la Pomeraiと結婚した。彼は1321年2月21日以前にイギリスデボンリンプストーンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey d'Aumarle(이)가 1268년 이전 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Fylegh(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan de la Pomerai(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1321년 2월 21일 이전 영국 데폰 림프스톤에서 사망했다.

mn.before 1268–before 21 February 1321: 1268 оноос өмнө–1321 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 21–наас өмнө
mn.Middle Chinnock, Somerset, England: Middle Chinnock, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey d'Aumarle nasceu antes 1268, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Fylegh, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de la Pomerai aproximadamente 1300, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 21 de fevereiro de 1321, em Lympstone, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey d'Aumarle родился перед 1268 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Fylegh, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de la Pomerai около 1300 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 21 февраль 1321 г. в местности лимпстоун, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey d'Aumarle nació antes de 1268, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Albemarle of Chinnock and Lympstone, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margery de Fylegh, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joan de la Pomerai aproximadamente 1300, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 21 de febrero de 1321, en Lympstone, Devon, Inglaterra.
